a8b083705553550eda289ddf9cf1d028df907682

Acta v0.2.0-pilot record · Generated from accepted canonical state (diagnoses/back-nav-stale-rows.md) after explicit acceptance (chat 2026-07-23 — diagnosis candidate pasted and confirmed after the board was fully judged) · Never generated from browser state.

checklist record · ACCEPTED

Diagnosis: bfcache restore without popstate

Safari's back-forward cache restores the pre-navigation DOM without firing popstate, so the URL changes while the list does not. H2 validated by exact correlation with pageshow.persisted; the event wiring, the pure filter, and the race hypothesis were each falsified by direct probes.

Diagnosis

Validated cause

H2 is the cause: Safari bfcache restores the pre-navigation DOM with pageshow.persisted=true and no popstate, so renderFromUrl never re-runs. H1 falsified (handler fires everywhere else), H3 falsified (pure core property-tested stable), H4 falsified (synchronous render, nothing to race). Fix direction — pageshow listener vs bfcache opt-out — is deliberately out of scope here.

Accepted via chat 2026-07-23 — explicit confirmation.

3 / 10repro rate on back-nav
Safari onlyobserved scope so far
render-onlyblast radius

Causal map

Each hypothesis attacks one edge of the render path: H1 the event, H2 the cache restore, H3 the filter, H4 the timing between them.

Hypotheses, as judged

H1popstate never fires on back Falsified

PredictsA log line inside the popstate handler would never appear on any back navigation.
ProbeInstrumented the handler and pressed back ten times across Safari and Chrome.
ObservedThe handler fired on every non-reproducing traversal and on all Chrome traversals — the event wiring itself is sound.

src/app.mjs:27trace 2026-07-23 §2

H2bfcache restores the old DOM without any event Validated

PredictsReproducing traversals would show a pageshow event with persisted=true and no popstate at all.
ProbeLogged pageshow.persisted alongside popstate during twenty Safari traversals.
ObservedAll three reproductions showed persisted=true with no popstate; every clean traversal showed a normal load or a popstate. Exact correlation.

trace 2026-07-23 §4webkit bfcache notes

H3filterByTag returns stale or reordered results Falsified

PredictsCalling the pure function directly with the review tag would sometimes return git rows.
ProbeProperty-tested filterByTag with the full dataset and both tags, five thousand iterations in Node.
ObservedIdentical, order-stable output every iteration — the pure core cannot produce the symptom.

src/catalog.mjs:8test run 2026-07-23

H4A render race lets the old list win Falsified

PredictsTwo renderFromUrl invocations would interleave, with the earlier one finishing last.
ProbeAdded invocation counters; renderFromUrl is synchronous end to end — there is nothing to interleave.
ObservedSingle invocation per event in every trace; the function has no await points.

src/app.mjs:14-31

Deliberately out of scope

  • whether the eventual fix listens to pageshow or opts out of bfcache — a change-blueprint question, not a diagnosis one

Sources

  1. [E1] qa notes 2026-07-23 — repro steps and frequency
  2. [E2] src/app.mjs — popstate wiring
  3. [E3] browser devtools traces from the repro session

Acta is a print-first engineering record. Fact = directly supported; Inference = reasoned from evidence; Simplification = deliberately reduced model. This record renders accepted canonical state only; open decisions live in the companion instrument.
